name: infolist-entry
description: A single labelled key-value row (<dt>+<dd>) used inside a description list (<dl>). Renders a read-only fact with a label and a value region — the infolist / descriptions pattern for a record detail view (name, status, address, date). Five variants (default/highlight/destructive/success/warning) control the value ink + tinted background. Three sizes (sm/md/lg) control label font, value font, and block padding-y. Orientation: vertical (label stacked above value) or horizontal (label column left, responsive collapse). Bordered mode adds a --lv-color-border cell ring. Colon after label via CSS ::after (not in DOM; screen-reader safe). Colspan emitted as data-colspan for the parent CSS grid. Optional leading slot for an icon or avatar in <dt>. Optional value slot (gg.jte.Content) for any server-rendered markup; absent -> empty fallback string. Loading state: skeleton pulse + aria-busy. Copyable: native <button> wired via data-lievit-action='copy' runtime directive (Clipboard API, CSP-clean). Safe escaping via two channels: attrs (TRUSTED raw, static strings) and dataAttrs (SAFE Map, Escape.htmlAttribute). v-next re-forge of the kit-facing display row: replaces the old type-switch (color/icon/image/code) with the spec-conformant label+value+slot API.
docs: Copies the infolist-entry partial to your JTE root at lievit/infolist-entry.jte, reached as @template.lievit.infolist-entry(label="...", value=...). Place it inside a <dl> container; the partial renders one <dt>+<dd> pair per call. Pick a variant (default/highlight/destructive/success/warning) to colour the value region. Use the leading slot for an icon or avatar in the label. Pass value=null or omit it to show the empty fallback (default '—', overridable via the empty param). Set loading=true for a skeleton pulse while the parent WIRE fetches. Set copyable=true for a runtime-wired copy-to-clipboard button (uses the native Clipboard API via data-lievit-action='copy'). Set colspan=N for entries that span multiple grid columns in a CSS-grid <dl>. Set orientation='horizontal' for a side-by-side label+value layout (label column width controlled by --lv-infolist-label-w, default 8rem). Extra attributes via two channels: attrs (TRUSTED raw $unsafe, static author-typed strings only) and dataAttrs (SAFE Map<String,String> of dynamic data-* attributes, each value HTML-escaped). The source is yours: edit freely.
